headline: Woman's Left Foot And Right Foot Have 'Different Pace, Now She Walks In Circles
summary: The left foot is 'more ambitious.' The right foot is 'more cautious.' She's been circling the block for 3 hours.
fullBody: Amanda McWalk has discovered her feet have 'different paces.' 'The left foot is more ambitious,' Amanda said. 'The right foot is more cautious.' She's been walking in circles for 3 hours. 'I just want to go straight,' Amanda said. Her feet are now in 'pace therapy.' The therapist recommended 'synchronized breathing.' Amanda is 'circling but hopeful.'
